payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet front with a vertical recessed panel and molded top trim; the right side and top are partially edge-cropped, showing a polished but slightly worn finish and wood grain, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
